identity.name: AgriGear ERP

principles: Zoom: Focus on Machine Health & Status

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, Modal titles

technical.usage: Machine IDs, VINs, Error Codes, Financial Figures, Dates

accent.description: Safety Orange - Alerts, Actions, Critical Status

containers.card: bg-card border border-border shadow-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden
containers.panel: bg-white border border-border/60 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground shadow-sm rounded-md px-6 py-2 transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 rounded-md px-6 py-2 shadow-sm

machinery_card.style: border-l-4 border-l-primary bg-white shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow
machinery_card.header: bg-muted/30 border-b border-border p-4 flex justify-between items-center

stat_card.style: bg-white border border-border p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between h-full hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

hero.alt: Modern tractor in field at sunset

farmer_avatar.usage: User profile, Farmer master data sample

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Implement a 'Light Mode' first strategy. Use the Deep Evergreen (#0F3D3E) for sidebars and primary actions to ground the lightness.
2. LAYOUT: Use a persistent Sidebar Navigation (Collapsible) for ERP modules. Top bar for Global Search, Notifications, and User Profile.
3. DASHBOARD: The 'Management' dashboard must use the Bento Grid. Mix 'Stat Cards' (Single metric), 'Chart Cards' (Revenue/Utilization), and 'List Cards' (Recent Bookings).
4. FORMS: ERPs are form-heavy. Use 'Sheet' (Side drawer) for quick edits and 'Dialog' (Modal) for critical confirmations. Full pages for complex creations (New Booking).
5. DATA: Use 'TanStack Table' (React Table) for all master data lists. Implement Sorting, Filtering, and Pagination by default.
6. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add hover states to table rows. Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications on every success/error action.
7. AUTH: Create a clean, split-screen Login page. Left side: Hero Image with overlay. Right side: Login Form.
8. ROLE-BASED: Ensure the UI adapts. If 'Mechanic' logs in, they see Maintenance tasks first, not Financial reports.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all IDs, Dates, and Currency figures.
Charts: Use 'Recharts' with the custom color palette defined above.
